rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations in component type annexes
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Use visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
anti_patterns: Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Do not treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
